title: Master Inventory of All Composite Systems

systems.name: Igneous Rocks (full series)
systems.channels: SiO₂, TiO₂, Al₂O₃, FeOt, MgO, CaO, Na₂O, K₂O
systems.notes: 28 rocks, vertex at andesite-dacite boundary (SiO₂≈59)

systems.name: Plutonic Rocks (subset)
systems.channels: SiO₂, TiO₂, Al₂O₃, FeOt, MgO, CaO, Na₂O, K₂O
systems.notes: 14 plutonic only. Strongest parabola R²=0.825. Slow cooling = tighter lock.

systems.name: Volcanic Rocks (subset)
systems.channels: SiO₂, TiO₂, Al₂O₃, FeOt, MgO, CaO, Na₂O, K₂O
systems.notes: 14 volcanic only. R²=0.44. Fast cooling = weaker lock.

systems.name: Intermediate Rocks (subset)
systems.channels: SiO₂, TiO₂, Al₂O₃, FeOt, MgO, CaO, Na₂O, K₂O
systems.flaw: Anti-lock (hill-shaped). R²=0.014. Marks alkaline-subalkaline divergence.
systems.notes: Correctly identified as regime boundary, not failure.

systems.name: U-238 Decay Chain
systems.notes: ∩-shaped anti-lock. Relaxation toward stable Pb-206.

systems.name: Th-232 Decay Chain
systems.notes: Anti-lock confirmed. Relaxation toward Pb-208.

systems.name: U-235 Decay Chain
systems.notes: Anti-lock confirmed. Relaxation toward Pb-207.

systems.name: SEMF Binding Energy Valley
systems.flaw: L-shaped full range. Non-stationary regime transition at M=12.
systems.notes: Split confirmed EXP-10: R²_full=0.432, R²_light=0.797, R²_heavy=0.933. Heavy nuclei near-perfect lock.

systems.name: Nuclide Chart (AME2020)
systems.opportunity: Full PLL scan across Z-chains. Could find new magic numbers.
systems.notes: 3,554 nuclides mapped. Used for valley analysis.

systems.name: Superheavy Elements Z=118→1000
systems.opportunity: Island of stability around Z≈522. Exotic nuclear shapes.
systems.notes: Extreme extrapolation. Found shell closure predictions at Z=120,126,164,184.

systems.name: Proton Mass Budget
systems.channels: Quark KE, Gluon Field, Trace Anomaly, Higgs Rest Mass
systems.opportunity: PLL across Q² scale (DGLAP evolution) would test compositional stability.
systems.notes: H/H_max=0.928. 91% from QCD, 9% from Higgs. Near-maximal entropy.

systems.name: Proton Spin Budget
systems.channels: Quark Spin, Gluon Spin, Quark Orbital, Gluon Orbital
systems.opportunity: PLL across x-Bjorken would map spin composition vs resolution.
systems.notes: H/H_max=0.969. 'Spin crisis' reframed as maximum entropy distribution.

systems.name: Parton Momentum (DGLAP evolution)
systems.notes: PLL R²_sA=0.980, R²_H=0.973, vertex at logQ²=-7.12. Compositional stability window confirmed.

systems.name: Quark Flavor Mass Hierarchy
systems.flaw: H/H_max=0.088 — most asymmetric composition in all of physics.
systems.opportunity: Froggatt-Nielsen ε=0.225 test. Is Cabibbo angle a compositional ratio?
systems.notes: 99.2% in Gen 3 (top quark dominates). Frozen symmetry breaking.

systems.name: CKM Mixing Matrix (u-row)
systems.opportunity: Full 3×3 CKM as 9-channel composition. Compare to PMNS (leptons).
systems.notes: H/H_max=0.182. Near-diagonal = near-zero entropy. 10¹⁰ CP shortfall.

systems.name: Exotic Hadrons (X, Z, P_c, T_cc)
systems.notes: 8 exotics. Molecular mean σ²_A=9.76 vs compact mean σ²_A=2.92. Clear discriminator. Testable LHCb Run 3-4.

systems.name: Blood Composition by Age
systems.opportunity: Full PLL across age 0-90. Vertex at ~27 = peak haem fitness.
systems.notes: From 30-domain hunt. Lock confirmed.

systems.name: Gut Microbiome Colonisation
systems.opportunity: Longitudinal PLL across infant→adult transition.
systems.notes: Neonatal phase lock. 2-force colonisation model.

systems.name: Gold/Silver Price Ratio
systems.notes: Founding experiment. 338 years (1688-2026). Vertex at 1751. Q=22.18.

systems.name: Planetary Atmospheres
systems.channels: CO₂, N₂, O₂, Ar, CH₄, H₂, He (varies per body)
systems.opportunity: Full comparative PLL: Venus vs Earth vs Mars vs Titan.
systems.notes: Split regime locks. Inner vs outer planet compositions differ fundamentally.

systems.name: IFR Burning Plasma (reference)
systems.notes: T=17.8 keV, n=2.70, B=12T. Alpha=50.2%. SPPI=1.000. Self-ignited.

systems.name: Spherical Tokamak (STEP/MAST-U)
systems.opportunity: PLL across κ (elongation) parameter space.
systems.notes: Alpha=72.9%. Best composition. High κ=2.8, low B=3.5T.

systems.name: Conventional Tokamak (ITER)
systems.flaw: Greenwald density limit blocks ignition at n=1.0×10²⁰.
systems.notes: Alpha=32.5%. Conduction-dominated (53.2%). Q=10 design.

systems.name: Compact HF Tokamak (SPARC/ARC)
systems.flaw: R^1.97 confinement penalty. Right magnets, wrong size.
systems.opportunity: Scale SPARC to R=6.2m → becomes the IFR.
systems.notes: Alpha=45.7%. 4.5% below ignition. Closest real machine to IFR.

systems.name: Krell Level 1 (Boosted)
systems.opportunity: Detailed engineering feasibility with today's HTS magnets.
systems.notes: Alpha=58.3%. Driven by 10× IFR. Q_eng=4.1. 67.9 GW plant.

systems.name: Krell Level 2 (Cyclotron wall)
systems.flaw: Cyclotron wall at 78.9%. B=45T, T=100 keV. Budget collapses.
systems.opportunity: Optically thick plasma (n>10²² m⁻³) could reabsorb cyclotron.
systems.notes: This is where the Krell cascade breaks. Fundamental limit of magnetic confinement.

systems.name: Stellarator (W7-X/HELIAS)
systems.flaw: Poor confinement without plasma current. Cond=59%.
systems.notes: Alpha=18.3%. Steady-state advantage doesn't compensate for transport losses.

systems.name: Inertial Confinement (NIF)
systems.flaw: B=0 → zero Cyclo but Cond=68.8% (hydrodynamic blowoff).
systems.notes: Alpha=22.5%. Q=1.5 achieved Dec 2022. Wall-plug efficiency <1%.

systems.name: FRC / TAE Helion (D-He3)
systems.flaw: D-He3 cross-section 100× below D-T. Brem=22.3% from high T.
systems.notes: Alpha=8.2%. FRC confinement too poor at R=0.3m.

systems.name: Proton-Boron (p-B11)
systems.flaw: Z_eff=5 → 25× Brem penalty. Brem=78.3% destroys budget.
systems.notes: The Bremsstrahlung wall. Cannot ignite with any known confinement.

systems.name: Magnetic Mirror
systems.flaw: Loss-cone leakage dominates Cond=46.6%.
systems.notes: Alpha=29.4%. Renaissance interest (Realta, WHAM) but physics limit stands.

systems.name: Z-Pinch (Zap Energy)
systems.flaw: τ~10ns. Ultra-short confinement → Cond=85%.
systems.notes: Alpha=1.2%. Dense but transient.

systems.name: Magnetised Target (General Fusion)
systems.flaw: Compression instabilities disrupt before ignition. Cond=80.4%.
systems.notes: Alpha=2.1%.

systems.name: Spheromak
systems.flaw: Too cold (T=5 keV), too small (R=0.5m). Cond=87.4%.
systems.notes: Alpha=0.3%. Nearly pure conduction loss.

systems.name: Muon-Catalysed Fusion
systems.flaw: Alpha-sticking limit ~150 fusions/muon. Brem=90%.
systems.notes: Cold fusion (T=0.01 keV). Fundamentally limited by muon lifetime.

systems.name: D-He3 Aneutronic Magnetic
systems.flaw: σ(D-He3) 100× below σ(D-T). Cannot compensate. Cond=50.5%.
systems.notes: Alpha=12.4%. Aneutronic dream but physics says no.

systems.name: Electrostatic Fusor
systems.flaw: Thermodynamic barrier. Cond=96.6%. n=0.01×10²⁰ far too low.
systems.notes: Alpha=0.8%. Neutron source only, never power.

systems.name: D-T Reaction Rate Composition
systems.notes: PLL vertex at 20.1 keV = optimal ignition temperature. Near-perfect parabola.

systems.name: Energy Partition (5-channel)
systems.channels: Neutron KE, Alpha heating, Brem, Cyclo, Cond
systems.notes: Bremsstrahlung = boundary species (34.9% CLR variance). Vertex at 43.3 keV.

systems.name: US State Energy Mix (10 states)
systems.channels: Coal, Gas, Nuclear, Hydro, Solar, Wind, Bio, Fossil, Renewables
systems.opportunity: Extend to all 50 states. Global comparison (EU, China, India).
systems.notes: 8/10 states lock. CA vertex 2014. WV/WY correctly fail (coal-dominated).

systems.name: European Energy Prices
systems.notes: From 30-domain hunt. Lock confirmed.

systems.name: NGFS Climate Energy Scenarios
systems.channels: Coal, Gas, Oil, Nuclear, Bio, Renewables
systems.opportunity: Bell test violation found — worth deeper analysis.
systems.notes: 35 scenarios tested. Lock across policy pathways.

systems.name: RC Bandpass Filter Response
systems.notes: Orders 1-6 tested. Shape flip at 4→5. Critical transition at order 2→3.

systems.name: Room Acoustics Spectrum
systems.notes: Highest R² observed in entire programme. Peter's founding domain.

systems.name: QGP (Quark-Gluon Plasma)
systems.opportunity: PLL across temperature (T_c to 5T_c). Map deconfinement transition.
systems.notes: H/H_max=0.971. η/s=1.5× KSS. 93% compositional efficiency.

systems.name: Color Confinement (qq̄ pair)
systems.notes: PLL R²=0.497, vertex at 1.38 fm, crossover at 0.70 fm. Bowl shape confirmed. String = QCD flux tube.

systems.name: QCD Running Coupling α_s(Q)
systems.channels: Strong coupling strength across energy scales
systems.notes: PLL R²=0.998, vertex at logQ=9.23, crossover at 0.53 GeV. Near-perfect parabola in log space.

systems.name: Wine Fermentation
systems.notes: 84% noise squeeze. From 30-domain hunt.

systems.name: Bacterial Growth Kinetics
systems.channels: Lag, Log, Stationary, Death phase fractions
systems.notes: From 30-domain hunt.

systems.name: Sun (pp-chain core)
systems.opportunity: Extend to CNO cycle stars. Compare main sequence vs giant branch.
systems.notes: Alpha≈98%, Neutrino≈2%. Gravitational confinement. 68,074× lower power density than IFR.

systems.name: Stellar Nucleosynthesis (BBN)
systems.channels: H, He, C, N, O, heavier elements
systems.opportunity: PLL across stellar mass (0.1-100 M_sun).
systems.notes: 86% noise squeeze. Lock confirmed in hunt.

systems.name: Neutron Star EOS
systems.channels: n, p, e, μ composition profile
systems.flaw: Muon threshold at 1.5ρ₀ creates topological channel birth (3→4 channels).
systems.notes: APR, SLy, BSk all give same σ²_A trajectory (R²>0.94). EOS-universality confirmed. Muon onset = regime boundary.

systems.name: Kilonova r-process
systems.opportunity: Compare GW170817 vs GW190425. Different mass ratios = different compositions.
systems.notes: From 30-domain hunt. Nucleosynthesis in extreme gravity.

systems.name: Cosmic Ray Flux
systems.flaw: Trajectory only (monotonic), no PLL vertex. Vertex at logE=16.9 (outside range).
systems.opportunity: Rerun with composition binned by energy decade. May find knee/ankle vertices.
systems.notes: R²=0.991 but monotonic. Diagnostic, not lock.

systems.name: Ocean Salinity Profiles
systems.channels: Na⁺, Cl⁻, SO₄²⁻, Mg²⁺, Ca²⁺, K⁺
systems.notes: From 30-domain hunt. Gravitationally stratified ocean chemistry.

systems.name: Tsunami Sediment Transport
systems.notes: From 30-domain hunt. Gravity-driven sorting.

systems.name: Nuclide Z-chains (8 isobar series)
systems.notes: A=16,40,56,90,120,150,180,208 isobar chains. Stability valley = compositional balance across Z.

systems.name: Stellar Mass Sequence (pp→CNO)
systems.notes: 16 stars 0.1-100 M☉. pp→CNO crossover at 1.35 M☉. Peak |dH/dM|=2.445 at 0.9 M☉. Gravitational leverage.

systems.name: GW150914 BBH Merger (mass budget)
systems.notes: H/H_max=0.175 — lowest entropy in all HUF. No-hair theorem as compositional minimum.

systems.name: GW150914 Phase Budget (inspiral/merger/ringdown)
systems.notes: 50%/33%/17% = H/H_max=0.923. Sits near 93% universal entropy bound. Extends bound to pure gravity.

systems.name: GW150914 QNM Mode Composition
systems.notes: (2,2,0) at 90%. No-hair as compositional minimum. Maximum gravitational compression → minimum entropy.

systems.name: GW170817 BNS Merger (matter bonus)
systems.notes: 5 channels vs BBH 3. H/H_max=0.111 — even lower entropy than BBH. Matter = extra channels but tighter lock.

systems.name: Gravity Role Classification (24 systems)
systems.notes: 24 systems classified. Activation scale ~10⁷ m. Below=silent, above=progressive dominance.

systems.name: Strong CP Problem (QCD vacuum)
systems.notes: PLL R²=0.390, vertex at θ=1.69, bowl shape. θ=0 minimum entropy confirmed. EITT axion prediction stands.

systems.name: EMC Effect (nuclear PDFs)
systems.channels: Valence quarks, Sea quarks, Gluons (in-medium vs free)
systems.notes: Free σ²_A=0.29, SRC-correlated σ²_A=-0.98. PLL R²=0.999. Testable at EIC (~2030s). 9 nuclei scanned.

systems.name: QGP Freeze-out (7 hadron species)
systems.channels: π, K, p, Λ, Ξ, Ω, φ
systems.notes: 0.27% EITT. Crosses nuclear-quark boundary. Lambda = boundary species.

systems.name: CKM Full 3×3 Matrix
systems.notes: Full H/H_max=0.564, σ²_A=15.48. Diagonal fraction 96.6%. Row entropies: [0.182, 0.189, 0.012].

systems.name: PMNS Matrix (Lepton Mixing)
systems.notes: H/H_max=0.911 vs CKM 0.564. Entropy ratio 1.615. PMNS near-maximal, CKM near-diagonal.

systems.name: Higgs Branching Ratios
systems.channels: bb̄, WW*, gg, ττ, cc̄, ZZ*, γγ, Zγ, μμ
systems.notes: H/H_max=0.568, σ²_A=5.80. bb̄-dominated. Coupling hierarchy maps to compositional asymmetry.

systems.name: CMB Power Spectrum Composition
systems.channels: Baryonic matter, Dark matter, Dark energy, Radiation, Neutrinos
systems.notes: Present H/H_max=0.475, BBN H/H_max=0.428. Universe entropy declining from 0.60 (BBN) → 0.29 (far future).

systems.name: Dark Matter / Baryon Ratio
systems.notes: 10 scales from NS (10⁴ m) to universe (4.4×10²⁶ m). DM confinement scale ~10²⁰ m analogous to QCD at 10⁻¹⁵ m.

systems.name: Demographics (HDI index)
systems.channels: Population age bands, GDP, HDI, Entropy
systems.flaw: Trajectory only (monotonic). Vertex at HDI=-0.24 (outside range).
systems.notes: R²=0.966 but no physical vertex. Diagnostic.

systems.name: Cardiac Arrhythmia Patterns
systems.channels: Normal, Atrial, Ventricular, Block, other rhythms
systems.notes: From 30-domain hunt.

systems.name: Atmospheric Chemistry
systems.channels: O₃, NO₂, SO₂, CO, PM2.5, PM10
systems.notes: From 30-domain hunt.

systems.name: Soil Mineralogy
systems.channels: Quartz, Feldspar, Mica, Clay minerals, Organics
systems.notes: From 30-domain hunt.
